seed_pages.content:
---
title: Verity Thornquist
type: person
aliases: [verity]
summary: Founder of Fernwheel.
---

Verity Thornquist is the founder of Fernwheel. Verity flagged churn as the top risk in the latest update.

---
title: Hamish Ashgrove
type: person
aliases: [hamish]
summary: Founder of Honeyspire Works.
---

Hamish Ashgrove is the founder of Honeyspire Works. Hamish pushed back on the proposed valuation during diligence.

---
title: Fernwheel
type: company
summary: Seed-stage company. Founded by Verity Thornquist.
---

Fernwheel is a seed-stage company. Founded by Verity Thornquist. The seed conversation started in 2025.

---
title: Cinderpath Capital
type: org
summary: Early-stage fund that co-invests on seed rounds.
---

Cinderpath Capital is an early-stage fund that co-invests on seed rounds.

turns.text: Draft a memo for the partner meeting: Verity Thornquist and Hamish Ashgrove both want Cinderpath Capital in the Fernwheel round.
Make the memo lead with traction, then risks, then the ask.
